ast.name: error
ast.source: This browser lacks typed array (Uint8Array) support which is required by `buffer` v5.x. Use `buffer` v4.x if you require old browser support.
ast.target: 此浏览器缺少 `buffer` v5.x 所需的类型化数组（Uint8Array）支持。如需旧浏览器支持，请使用 `buffer` v4.x。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag(s) used to identify literature notes in frontmatter. Separate multiple tags with commas or spaces (e.g., "literature_note, excalidraw").
ast.target: 用于在 frontmatter 中识别文献笔记的标签。多个标签请用逗号或空格分隔（例如：“literature_note, excalidraw”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open a newly created literature note in the workspace
ast.target: 在工作区中自动打开新创建的文献笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a subfolder for each citation (e.g., biblib/citation-key/citation-key.pdf)
ast.target: 为每条引用创建子文件夹（例如：biblib/citation-key/citation-key.pdf）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where literature notes will be stored. Use forward slashes for subfolders. Use "/" for vault.
ast.target: 文献笔记存放的文件夹。子文件夹请使用正斜杠。使用“/”表示库根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a random suffix to citekeys shorter than this length
ast.target: 为长度短于此值的 citekey 添加随机后缀

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include this field in new literature notes
ast.target: 在新的文献笔记中包含此字段

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The label shown in the modal

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional help text shown below the field
ast.target: 显示在字段下方的可选帮助文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Mark as required (for UI hint only)
ast.target: 标记为必填（仅用于界面提示）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When editing a note, regenerate the citekey if relevant data changes
ast.target: 编辑笔记时，如相关数据变更则重新生成 citekey

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When the citekey changes during edit, rename the file to match
ast.target: 在编辑时 citekey 发生变化，将文件重命名以匹配

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow the plugin to receive data from the Zotero Connector browser extension. Note: Zotero should NOT be running when using this feature.
ast.target: 允许插件从 Zotero Connector 浏览器扩展接收数据。注意：使用此功能时不应运行 Zotero。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The port to use for the Zotero Connector server. Default is 23119, which is the standard Zotero port.
ast.target: 用于 Zotero Connector 服务器的端口。默认是 23119，这是 Zotero 的标准端口。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path where to save the bibliography.json file (relative to vault)
ast.target: 保存 bibliography.json 文件的路径（相对于库）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path where to save the citekeylist.md file (relative to vault)
ast.target: 保存 citekeylist.md 文件的路径（相对于库）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path where to save the exported BibTeX file (relative to vault)
ast.target: 保存导出的 BibTeX 文件的路径（相对于库）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Import a file or link to an existing vault file
ast.target: 导入文件或链接到现有库文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Link existing notes that relate to this entry
ast.target: 链接与此条目相关的现有笔记

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 选择使用导入文件中的引用键还是生成新的引用键

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What to do when a literature note with the same citekey already exists
ast.target: 当已存在相同引用键的文献笔记时的处理方式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate a new citekey based on current data (may rename the file)
ast.target: 根据当前数据生成新的引用键（可能会重命名文件）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This feature (JSON output with special formatting) is unstable. See https://github.com/larsgw/citation.js/issues/144
ast.target: 此功能（带特殊格式的 JSON 输出）不稳定。见 https://github.com/larsgw/citation.js/issues/144

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
getEntities accepts 50 ids max to match Wikidata API limitations:
      this request won't get all the desired entities.
      You can use getManyEntities instead to generate several request urls
      to work around this limitation
ast.target:
getEntities 最多接受 50 个 id 以符合 Wikidata API 限制：
      此请求无法获取所有所需实体。
      你可以改用 getManyEntities 生成多个请求 url
      以绕过此限制

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在 BibLib 中创建数组：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在 frontmatter 中正确渲染：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Using dash prefixes will NOT automatically create arrays:
ast.target: 使用破折号前缀不会自动创建数组：

ast.name: text
ast.source: This renders as multi-line text, not an array:
ast.target: 这会渲染为多行文本，而不是数组：

ast.name: text
ast.source: These variables are arrays that can be used with loop syntax:
ast.target: 这些变量是数组，可与循环语法一起使用：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Important: Arrays must be valid JSON to be processed correctly. Common issues to avoid:
ast.target: 重要：数组必须是有效的 JSON 才能被正确处理。需要避免的常见问题：

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can format any variable using pipe syntax:
ast.target: 你可以使用管道语法格式化任何变量：

ast.name: text
ast.source: When iterating through arrays, you can use these special variables to control formatting:
ast.target: 遍历数组时，你可以使用这些特殊变量来控制格式：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 使用位置元数据的示例：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Would produce: "1. John Smith, 2. Maria Rodriguez, 3. Wei Zhang."
ast.target: 将生成：“1. John Smith, 2. Maria Rodriguez, 3. Wei Zhang.”

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure how citekeys are generated for new literature notes.
ast.target: 配置新文献笔记的 citekey 生成方式。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 与参考文献导出工具冲突

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure frequently used languages to appear at the top of language dropdowns in modals.
ast.target: 将常用语言配置为在弹窗中的语言下拉列表顶部显示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure which CSL-compliant fields appear as primary inputs in the "Create literature note" modal.
ast.target: 配置哪些符合 CSL 的字段作为“创建文献笔记”弹窗中的主要输入项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This is useful for workflows that frequently use specific fields (e.g., archival research needing archive, archive-place, archive_location).
ast.target: 这对经常使用特定字段的工作流很有用（例如档案研究需要 archive、archive-place、archive_location）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure default behavior when editing existing literature notes.
ast.target: 配置编辑现有文献笔记时的默认行为。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure settings for the Zotero Connector integration. Note: This feature is only available on desktop.
ast.target: 配置 Zotero Connector 集成的设置。注意：此功能仅在桌面端可用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enable the Zotero Connector option above
ast.target: 启用上面的 Zotero Connector 选项

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the Zotero Connector browser extension as normal
ast.target: 照常使用 Zotero Connector 浏览器扩展

ast.name: text
ast.source: The bibliography modal will open with the data pre-filled
ast.target: 参考文献弹窗将以预填充的数据打开

ast.name: text
ast.source: Any PDF attachments will be downloaded and automatically linked
ast.target: 任何 PDF 附件都将被下载并自动链接

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note: You can toggle this feature with the "Toggle Zotero Connector server" command.
ast.target: 注意：你可以使用“Toggle Zotero Connector server”命令切换此功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure settings for the bibliography builder command.
ast.target: 配置书目构建器命令的设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This field name is not a standard CSL variable and may not be compatible with other tools.
ast.target: 此字段名称不是标准 CSL 变量，可能与其他工具不兼容。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 从标识符或 BibTeX 自动填充

ast.name: text
ast.source: Warning: This operation may create or overwrite many files. Consider backing up your vault first.
ast.target: 警告：此操作可能创建或覆盖许多文件。请先考虑备份你的库。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Save the exported bibliography.bib and files/ folder to your vault
ast.target: 将导出的 bibliography.bib 和 files/ 文件夹保存到你的库中

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select the bibliography.bib file in this dialog
ast.target: 在此对话框中选择 bibliography.bib 文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Important: You must move the entire export folder (with the files/ subdirectory) into your vault before importing to ensure attachments are found.
ast.target: 重要：导入前必须将整个导出文件夹（包含 files/ 子目录）移动到你的库中，以确保能找到附件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose which parts of the note should be updated when saving changes:
ast.target: 选择保存更改时应更新的笔记部分：

ast.name: title
ast.target: 用于气候预测的神经网络
